mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, tech_stack, start_date, end_date, status, created_at FROM project ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, description, tech_stack, start_date, end_date, status, created_at FROM project WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.tech_stack, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.status, p.created_at, mp.role, mp.contribution FROM project p JOIN member_project mp ON p.id = mp.project_id WHERE mp.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY p.start_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project (name, description, tech_stack, start_date, end_date, status, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{techStack}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, 1, NOW())
